mapper.insert: insert into virtual_user_credits (user_id, balance, frozen, total_earned, total_spent, total_refunded, version, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{balance}, #{frozen}, #{totalEarned}, #{totalSpent}, #{totalRefunded}, 0, sysdate())
mapper.update: update virtual_user_credits set balance = balance + #{amount}, total_earned = total_earned + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and version = #{version}
